highlights.text: I wrote on Thursday at 4pm: “My general lean is to defer to the trend.
From there we went elevator down off Sunday’s open, which would setup the next short squeeze as always I wrote on Friday at 4pm: “My general lean is always to defer to the trend until it ends.
Elevator down refers to a period where ES sells rapidly, ignoring supports in the process.
Every point of elevator down sell is mostly paid back to bulls in the form of an equally or more violent short squeeze.
They occur when ES puts in my core setup: The Failed Breakdown.
It was caused - like all squeezes - by a Failed Breakdown.
In today’s newsletter I’ll talk this, I’ll go over today’s Failed Breakdowns (these are key to know), and I’ll discuss the actionable plan for tomorrow.
As long as this remains the case, next leg up sees 7020, 7032, 7048 which is next magnet.” Overnight ES trapped below 6964, recovered, and ripped to 7020 by 2:30PM today.

post_title: Bulls Bought The Sunday Dip In SPX. Will CPI Tomorrow Ruin The Rally? January 13 Plan
